name: Shashi's Parma Aloo
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all ingredients, except the potatoes, in a bowl and mix to form a paste.
3. Peel the potatoes and cut a half-inch wedge from each.
4. Rub the space with spice paste; reinsert the wedge and rub the potatoes all over with the remaining spice.
5. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 30-40 minutes, turning every 10 minutes, until tender.
6. Serve immediately.
